title: ANGRAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Research Associate Posts
description: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Research Associate Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc, Ph.D, and Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the ANGRAU Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address bel...
